creator: scorpio@drkshdw.org
text:
update to MASTER_SITES for fmio

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=    d.s.div@bigfoot.com--5DECSDCHlKhKtXJpFMkGsDED3i1qlosMyMmxsQHEagoAXA1w
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.old        Mon May 21 18:37:51 2001
+++ Makefile    Mon May 21 18:38:01 2001
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      fmio
 PORTVERSION=   1.1.4
 CATEGORIES=    audio
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.jumbo.narod.ru/src/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://www.jumbo.narod.ru/src/fmio/
